channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: How to Lose a Navy in 10 Days
item.description: The naval strikes against Iran reveal how quickly modern fleets can be crippled. Today’s maritime campaigns aim not just to sink ships, but to blind sensors, disrupt command networks, and destroy ports—often within the opening days of war.

item.title: China’s Solar Industry Is in Upheaval—The Effects Will Be Global
item.description: Rather than opening space for rivals, China’s solar industry shakeout is forging a more resilient core — embedding deeper into global value chains, securing a technological lead, and reshaping the industry’s future trajectory to its own long-term advantage.

item.title: Active Cyber Defense in the Korean Context
item.description: Active cyber defense in the South Korean context reflects a larger strategic adjustment to an increasingly hostile environment. It will require significantly expanded military and intelligence capabilities.
